privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated Change Detection VWM data. The data contains exactly 20 valid participants and 1 intentionally contaminated participant ('p25') who exhibits physiologically impossible perfect accuracy (100% hits, 0% false alarms) across all set sizes (2, 4, 6, 8). The expected output is a JSON report at /home/ga/pebl/analysis/k_capacity_report.json containing Cowan's K capacity estimates.
